scripts.dev:next-laravel: concurrently -n next,laravel -c cyan,magenta "turbo run dev --filter=@headless/web" "cd apps/api-laravel && php artisan serve --port=8000"
scripts.dev:next-hono: concurrently -n next,hono -c cyan,green "turbo run dev --filter=@headless/web" "turbo run dev --filter=@headless/api-hono"
scripts.dev:next-sf: concurrently -n next,symfony -c cyan,yellow "turbo run dev --filter=@headless/web" "cd apps/api-sf && symfony server:start --port=8002 --no-tls"
scripts.dev:tanstack-laravel: concurrently -n tanstack,laravel -c cyan,magenta "turbo run dev --filter=@headless/web-tanstack" "cd apps/api-laravel && php artisan serve --port=8000"
scripts.dev:tanstack-hono: concurrently -n tanstack,hono -c cyan,green "turbo run dev --filter=@headless/web-tanstack" "turbo run dev --filter=@headless/api-hono"
scripts.dev:tanstack-sf: concurrently -n tanstack,symfony -c cyan,yellow "turbo run dev --filter=@headless/web-tanstack" "cd apps/api-sf && symfony server:start --port=8002 --no-tls"
